title: Help two foster homes for children with donation drive scheduled for tomorrow 25 April
description: GEORGE NEWS - Members of the Non-Profit...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Members of the Non-Profit Company Alive for Jesus will visit two foster homes in Thembalethu tomorrow, Thursday 25 April, to make one big donation of shoes, clothing and toiletries.

Volunteers will help to upgrade these homes, which falls under the care of Life Community Services.


> Donations for this project are most welcome, including wall paint and a stove. Clothing and toys will make a difference to these children’s lives.


For more information contact Izak & Elmarie Malan at 082 412 8876 or send an email to [email protected] or visit their website www.aliveforjesus.org

The Alive for Jesus team at an outreach to George Night Shelter 22 December 2023.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
